## Agent Safety Checklist
For Forge/Hermes/remote-agent PRs:

- [ ] I worked on a branch, not directly on `main`.
- [ ] I did not touch secrets, `.env*`, production credentials, billing, Vercel, Supabase, or GitHub admin settings unless explicitly approved.
- [ ] I did not use force-push, history rewrite, destructive cleanup, or broad refactors outside scope.
- [ ] I followed `docs/FORGE_SAFETY.md` and documented any escalation/approval needed.
